docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY HEYLIGER ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEYLIGER ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA FRANCISCO $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, RETURN ELECTRIC BLANKET BY SYLVIA GUERRERO TO PLTF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
